name: audit-toolkit
description: A team of skills for rigorous, standards-based, defensible audits tuned to U.S. standards (US GAAP, AICPA AU-C / PCAOB AS): financial audit methodology, internal control (COSO / SOX ICFR), reconciliations, fraud detection (AU-C 240, BSA/FinCEN AML), and working papers / audit trail (AU-C 230 / AS 1215). Output in Spanish by default.
